title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§405. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the Eighteenth Judicial District shall annually, at the same time it prepares its general budget or expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:404.
doc_text:
§405.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes composing the
Eighteenth Judicial District shall annually, at the same time it prepares its
general budget or expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed
in R.S. 16:404.
